aiDescription.en: This 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom corner unit in Puchong offers 1,076 sqft of practical living space designed for family life. The layout provides separate rooms for children and parents, with two covered car park spaces for family vehicles. Located within a residential neighbourhood with 24-hour security, the property sits close to a kindergarten and childcare centre within a 5-10 min walk, making daily drop-offs manageable. A clinic is within a <500m walk for quick medical needs, and a convenience store is nearby for everyday essentials. A mosque is accessible within a <5km drive for religious observances. Schools, a mamak restaurant and grocery options are within a <2km drive. The unit is sold without furnishings, allowing families to personalise the space according to their own preferences and budget.
aiDescription.my: Unit penjuru 3 bilik tidur, 2 bilik air di Puchong menawarkan 1,076 kaki persegi ruang hidup praktikal untuk kehidupan keluarga. Susun atur menyediakan bilik berasingan untuk kanak-kanak dan ibu bapa, dengan dua tempat letak kereta berbumbung untuk kenderaan keluarga. Terletak dalam kawasan perumahan dengan keselamatan 24 jam, hartanah ini berhampiran tadika dan pusat jagaan kanak-kanak dalam 5-10 minit jalan, menjadikan penghantaran harian boleh diurus. Klinik dalam <500m jalan untuk keperluan perubatan segera, dan kedai runcit berhampiran untuk keperluan harian. Masjid boleh diakses dalam <5km pandu untuk ibadat. Sekolah, restoran mamak dan pilihan runcit dalam <2km pandu. Unit dijual tanpa perabot, membolehkan keluarga memperibadikan ruang mengikut pilihan sendiri.
aiDescription.cn: 这套位于蒲种的3卧室2浴室角单位提供1,076平方英尺的实用居住空间，专为家庭生活设计。布局为孩子和父母提供独立房间，配备两个有盖停车位。位于24小时保安的住宅区，物业靠近幼儿园和托儿所，步行5-10分钟可达，方便日常接送。诊所步行不到500米，可快速就医，附近有便利店满足日常需求。清真寺在5公里车程内可供礼拜。学校、嘛嘛档和杂货店在2公里车程内。单位不带家具销售，让家庭可以根据自己的喜好和预算个性化布置空间。

The compact layout is practical for singles or young couples. Multiple coffee shops including ZUS Coffee and The Coffee Bean are within a 5-10 min walk, suitable for remote work sessions or casual meetings. Fast food options like Domino's, Burger King and Subway are also nearby. The building provides 24-hour security, a gymnasium and a swimming pool for post-work relaxation. No car park space is allocated with this unit, which may require arrangement with building management. Affin Bank is within a <5km drive. Giant Seri Kembangan Mall and convenience stores are within a 5-10 min walk for daily needs.

aiDescription.en: This 450 sqft studio unit at Tiara Imperio, Bangi is fully furnished with a functional layout ideal for a single occupant or couple. The compact open-plan design includes a defined living area, sleeping zone and a fitted kitchen. One covered car park space is included. The nearest KTM station at UKM is accessible within the neighbourhood for commute connectivity. Daily essentials are available from a nearby convenience store, and a nasi kandar restaurant is within walking distance. Basic building facilities are provided. The studio configuration suits professionals who prefer a low-maintenance, move-in ready unit with functional furnishings in a residential area with essential amenities within reach.

Reka bentuk pelan terbuka padat termasuk kawasan tinggal jelas, zon tidur dan dapur lengkap. Satu tempat letak kereta berbumbung disediakan. Konfigurasi studio sesuai untuk profesional yang lebih suka unit sedia huni dengan kemudahan berfungsi di kawasan kediaman dengan amenities penting dalam jangkauan.

aiDescription.en: This studio unit at Tiara Imperio provides a blank canvas for working adults seeking a customisable living and work setup. The bare unit enables residents to design their workspace exactly to their preference. KTM connectivity is available within a 5-10 min walk, linking residents to wider Greater KL for daily commutes. A restaurant is within a <500m walk and convenience store within a <500m walk for daily essentials. No carpark is included, which may be a consideration for those with private vehicles. Building facilities include a gym and swimming pool for post-work relaxation. The development features 24-hour security. Good mobile signal supports remote work needs.
aiDescription.my: Unit studio di Tiara Imperio menyediakan kanvas kosong untuk dewasa bekerja yang mencari ruang hidup dan kerja yang boleh disesuaikan. Unit tanpa perabot membolehkan penduduk merekabentuk ruang kerja mengikut kehendak mereka. Ketersambungan KTM tersedia dalam 5-10 min jalan, menghubungkan penduduk ke seluruh KL Besar untuk perjalanan harian. Restoran dalam <500m jalan dan kedai runcit dalam <500m jalan untuk keperluan harian. Tiada tempat letak kereta disediakan, yang mungkin perlu dipertimbangkan oleh mereka yang memiliki kenderaan persendirian. Kemudahan bangunan termasuk gim dan kolam renang untuk berehat selepas bekerja. Pembangunan menampilkan keselamatan 24 jam. Isyarat mudah alih yang baik menyokong keperluan bekerja jarak jauh.
aiDescription.cn: 这套位于班月的Tiara Imperio工作室单位为寻求可定制生活和办公空间的工作人士提供了一张白纸。毛坯单位允许居民按自己的偏好设计工作区域。最近地铁站在5-10分钟步行范围内，可通往大吉隆坡地区便于日常通勤。餐厅和便利店均在<500米步行范围内。该单位不配停车位，对于有私家车的住户可能需要考虑。楼宇设施包括健身房和游泳池供下班后放松使用。小区配备24小时安保。良好的移动信号支持远程办公需求。

aiDescription.en: This studio unit at Xania Reflexion in Puchong is positioned near the Brickfields transit hub, offering excellent connectivity for daily commutes. KL Sentral station providing MRT, LRT, and KTM services is within a <500m walk. Multiple banks including CIMB, Maybank, and Public Bank are within a <2km drive, with convenience stores and coffee shops such as 7-Eleven and Starbucks within a <500m walk. Restaurants and fast-food options including KFC, McDonald's, and Japanese dining are scattered throughout the immediate area. The unit is unfurnished, offering a blank canvas for tenants to configure their own living and work setup. No parking is allocated with this unit.
aiDescription.my: Unit studio di Xania Reflexion, Puchong terletak berhampiran hab transit Brickfields, menawarkan kesambungan excellent untuk perjalanan harian. Stesen KL Sentral yang menyediakan perkhidmatan MRT, LRT dan KTM dalam <500m jalan. Pelbagai bank termasuk CIMB, Maybank dan Public Bank dalam <2km pandu, dengan kedai serbaneka dan kedai kopi seperti 7-Eleven dan Starbucks dalam <500m jalan. Restoran dan pilihan makanan segera termasuk KFC, McDonald's dan japan dining terdapat di seluruh kawasan sekitar. Unit tidak dihiasi, menawarkan kanvas kosong untuk penghuniconfigure persediaan tempat tinggal dan kerja sendiri. Tiada tempat letak kereta diperuntukkan dengan unit ini.

aiDescription.en: Candella Alam Sari offers a zero-bedroom, open-plan layout in the Alam Sari neighbourhood of Bangi, suited to those seeking a compact living or workspace solution. The absence of defined bedrooms and bathrooms means the unit is best suited to single occupancy or as a dedicated work studio rather than a primary residence. No car park spaces are included, which may require alternative arrangements for vehicle owners. The surrounding area is well-served by educational institutions—multiple kindergartens and the Universiti Kebangsaan Malaysia campus are within a <5km drive, creating a quiet, academic environment. The unit is delivered unfurnished, allowing occupants to configure the space for work, study, or lifestyle purposes. Nearby neighbourhood stores support everyday needs.
aiDescription.my: Candella Alam Sari menawarkan reka bentuk ruang terbuka tanpa bilik tidur di kawasan Alam Sari, Bangi, sesuai untuk mereka yang mencari penyelesaian hidup atau ruang kerja yang компакт. Ketiadaan bilik tidur dan bilik air yang jelas bermakna unit ini paling sesuai untuk 单人 occupancy atau sebagai studio kerja khusus berbanding kediaman utama. Tiada tempat letak kereta disertakan, yang mungkin memerlukan pengaturan alternatif untuk pemilik kenderaan. Kawasan sekeliling dilayani dengan baik oleh institusi pendidikan—beberapa tadika dan kampus Universiti Kebangsaan Malaysia dalam <5km pandu, mewujudkan persekitaran yang tenang dan akademik. Unit ini dihantar tanpa perabot, membolehkan penghuni mengkonfigurasi ruang untuk kerja, pembelajaran, atau tujuan gaya hidup.
aiDescription.cn: Candella Alam Sari在 Bangi 的 Alam Sari 住宅区提供开放式布局，无独立卧室，适合寻求紧凑生活或工作空间的人士。由于缺乏明确的卧室和卫生间，该单位最适合单人居住或专用工作室，而非主要住宅。未配备停车位，车主可能需要其他安排。周边地区教育机构完善——多所幼儿园和马来亚大学校园在5公里车程内，营造出安静的学习环境。单位以无家具状态交付，允许居住者根据工作、学习或生活方式需求配置空间。

aiDescription.en: This 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom unit spans 1,100 sqft in a residential condominium in Balakong. The layout is open and functional, offering a combined living and dining area that can adapt to a growing family's needs. No fixtures are included, giving flexibility to personalise the space. 24-hour security provides peace of mind for families. Children have access to a playground and a swimming pool within the development. Several primary and secondary schools sit within a short drive, with the Australian International School also nearby. The Mines Shopping Mall with its hypermarket is within a short drive, while multiple convenience stores are within walking distance. A clinic is in the vicinity. One covered parking space is allocated.

Beberapa sekolah rendah dan menengah dalam jarak pandu singkat. The Mines Shopping Mall dengan pasaraya berhampiran. Kedai runcit dalam jarak berjalan kaki dan klinik dalam kawasan. Satu tempat letak kereta berbumbung diperuntukkan.

aiDescription.en: This 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom condominium in Taman Universiti, Kajang offers 1,001 sqft of open living space within a well-established residential neighbourhood. The unit is unfurnished, allowing families to personalise the layout to their needs. Two covered car park spaces are included. The area is a recognised school zone with multiple primary and secondary schools within a 5-10 min walk, making daily school runs convenient. A childcare centre is also within walking distance. A convenience store is reachable within a <500m walk, and a mamak restaurant is within a <2km drive. Medical clinic access is available within a <2km drive. Building facilities include a swimming pool, playground and 24-hour security. The surrounding neighbourhood is mature with established greenery and community feel.
aiDescription.my: Kondominium 3 bilik tidur, 2 bilik air di Taman Universiti, Kajang menawarkan 1,001 kaki persegi ruang tamu terbuka dalam kejiranan kediaman yang mantap. Unit tidak berpenghuni, membolehkan keluarga mengubah suai susun atur mengikut keperluan. Dua tempat letak kereta berbumbung disediakan. Kawasan ini merupakan zon sekolah yang diiktiraf dengan beberapa sekolah rendah dan menengah dalam 5-10 minit berjalan kaki. Tadika juga dalam jarak berjalan. aiDescription.en: This 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom unit in Taman Sri Serdang spans 850 sqft with partially furnished interiors. The layout provides practical living spaces suitable for a small family, with 3 schools within a 5-10 min walk including Tadika ABS Sri Serdang, Tadika APC Tmn Sri Serdang, and SMK Seri Serdang. Multiple convenience stores are within a <500m walk and a grocery shop is nearby for daily needs. A mamak restaurant sits within a <2km drive for family dining. The area has 24-hour security, a children's playground and swimming pool within the building. One covered parking space is included. UPM is within a <2km drive, providing tertiary education access. Telco signal is good in the area.
aiDescription.my: Unit 3 bilik tidur, 2 bilik air di Taman Sri Serdang seluas 850 kaki persegi dengan interior separa berkeperluan. Banyak kedai runcit dalam <500m jalan dan kedai runcit berdekatan. Restoran mamak dalam <2km pandu untuk makan keluarga. Kawasan ini mempunyai keselamatan 24 jam, taman permainan kanak-kanak dan kolam renang dalam bangunan. Satu tempat letak kereta berbumbung disediakan. UPM dalam <2km pandu. Isyarat telco baik.

aiDescription.en: This 1-bedroom, 1-bathroom unit in Seri Kembangan is fully furnished with functional pieces, offering a practical setup for a single occupant or couple. The property sits in a well-served neighbourhood with abundant dining options — restaurants, mamak, coffee, fast food and specialist eateries are all within a <500m walk. Essential services include clinics and pharmacies within a <2km drive, convenience stores within a <500m walk, and banking services within a <5km drive. No parking is included, which is a key limitation for car-dependent commuters. Public transport options in the area are accessible, and the neighbourhood's walkability supports those who rely on ride-hailing or transit. The compact layout suits minimal living without space for a dedicated home office.
aiDescription.my: Unit 1 bilik tidur, 1 bilik air di Seri Kembangan sepenuhnya berperabot dengan kepingan fungsian, sesuai untuk seorang atau pasangan. Hartanah dalam kawasan berkhidmat baik dengan pilihan makananan melimpah — restoran, mamak, kopi, makanan segera dalam <500m jalan. Perkhidmatan penting termasuk klinik dan farmasi dalam <2km pandu, kedai mudah dalam <500m jalan, dan perkhidmatan bank dalam <5km pandu. Tiada tempat letak kereta termasuk, menjadi had utama untuk komuter yang bergantung pada kereta. Pilihan pengangkutan awam boleh diakses, dan kediaman kawasan menyokong mereka yang bergantung pada ridesharing atau transit. Susun atur padat sesuai untuk hidup minimalis tanpa ruang pejabat rumah khusus.

The unfurnished layout gives families the freedom to personalise the space, with three bedrooms and a combined living-dining area that can be arranged to suit different household needs. A standout feature for families is the cluster of primary and secondary schools within a <500m walk, including Sekolah Rendah Islam Integrasi Tahfiz As Syakirin, Tadika ABS Bandar Seri Putra and SMK Bandar Seri Putra, making school runs highly manageable. A mosque, clinic and pharmacy are all within a <2km drive, providing essential neighbourhood support. A mamak restaurant and convenience store are within a <500m walk for daily essentials. One covered parking space is allocated.

aiDescription.en: Perfect family sanctuary awaits in Taman Bukit Palma! This spacious 4-bedroom, 2-bathroom unit spans 970 sqft with a practical layout ideal for growing families. The unfurnished interior allows you to create a personalized home that reflects your family's unique style and needs. Excellent location with multiple educational institutions nearby – Taska Rizwani (600m), SK Kantan Permai (700m), and Tadika Intelektual Saujana (800m) are all within easy walking distance, making school runs stress-free. Children will love the playground and swimming pool facilities, while parents appreciate the 24-hour security and covered parking for 2 vehicles. The efficient elevator service makes moving groceries and carrying children effortless. Surau An Nur is just 400m away for daily prayers. A restaurant sits within 500m for quick family meals. The property offers good telco signal coverage for connected family living. This move-in ready unit provides the perfect blank canvas to design your dream family home in a secure, established neighborhood.
aiDescription.my: Surga keluarga yang sempurna menanti di Taman Bukit Palma! Unit 4 bilik tidur, 2 bilik air yang luas seluas 970 kaki persegi dengan reka letak praktikal yang sesuai untuk keluarga yang sedang berkembang. Bahagian dalaman tanpa perabot membolehkan anda menciptakan rumah yang diperibadikan. Lokasi cemerlang dengan institusi pendidikan berdekatan – Taska Rizwani (600m), SK Kantan Permai (700m), dan Tadika Intelektual Saujana (800m). Kemudahan termasuk kawasan bermain, kolam renang, keselamatan 24 jam, dan tempat letak kereta berbumbung untuk 2 kenderaan. Lif yang cekap memudahkan rutina harian. Surau An Nur 400m untuk solat. Restoran dalam 500m untuk makan keluarga. Isyarat telco yang baik untuk kehidupan keluarga yang bersambung.
aiDescription.cn: 完美家庭居所在淡江皇冠再也等待您！这套宽敞的4卧室2浴室单位占地970平方英尺，实用布局非常适合成长中的家庭。未装修的室内让您能够打造个性化的梦想家园。优越位置，多所教育机构近在咫尺——Taska Rizwani（600米）、SK Kantan Permai（700米）和Tadika Intelektual Saujana（800米）均在步行范围内。儿童游乐场和游泳池设施让孩子们乐在其中，家长则可享受24小时安保和2个有盖停车位的便利。高效电梯服务让日常生活更轻松。400米处的Surau An Nur满足祈祷需求。500米内有餐厅。良好的电讯信号覆盖让家庭生活更加便捷。

aiDescription.en: An exceptional corner lot sanctuary in the established Serene Heights community, perfect for growing families! This spacious double-storey home offers 4 bedrooms and 4 bathrooms across 1,560 sqft. The coveted corner position provides extra land width, ensuring better ventilation and a safer buffer from the road for children to play. Being an unfurnished unit, it offers a rare opportunity for families to design their dream kitchen and install personalized built-in cabinets. Two covered parking bays easily accommodate the family cars. The neighborhood is safe and conducive for family living, with nearby educational institutions like Advance Tertiary College (approx. 1.5km) and Big Ben Education Group. Family weekends are sorted with quick access to the LEKAS and SILK highways for trips to KLCC. Essential healthcare is accessible at Klinik Medisquare, while nearby mosques fulfill spiritual needs.

Rumah seluas 1,560 kaki persegi ini menawarkan 4 bilik tidur dan 4 bilik air. Kedudukan sudut yang diidamkan memberikan ruang tambahan dan peredaran udara yang lebih baik. Kediaman kos ini (unfurnished) memberikan peluang istimewa untuk keluarga mereka bentuk dapur impian dan almari binaan sendiri. Dua tempat letak kereta berbumbung memudahkan parkir kenderaan keluarga. Kejiranan yang selamat dengan akses mudah ke Lebuhraya LEKAS dan SILK. Kemudahan kesihatan di Klinik Medisquare dan masjid berdekatan memenuhi keperluan harian.
aiDescription.cn: 位于成熟社区Serene Heights的优质角落排屋，是成长中家庭的完美选择！这套宽敞的双层房屋拥有4间卧室和4间浴室，建筑面积1,560平方英尺。令人向往的角落位置提供了额外的宽度和更好的通风，为儿童玩耍提供了更安全的缓冲区。作为空置单位（未装修），它为家庭提供了设计梦想厨房和安装个性化储物柜的难得机会。两个有盖停车位轻松满足家庭停车需求。社区安全宜居，通过LEKAS和 SILK 大道可快速前往吉隆坡市中心。附近有医疗诊所和清真寺。

aiDescription.en: Discover family comfort and convenience at Koi Kinrara, Puchong. This unfurnished 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom residence offers a generous 1400 sqft of space, ready for your personal touch. Imagine creating a warm, inviting home for your loved ones in these spacious rooms. The property is located within proximity to essential family needs, with schools like KAFA Integrasi Nahdatul Islamiah just 1.4km away, and healthcare facilities such as Poliklinik PJCC at 1.7km. Daily essentials are easily accessible with numerous convenience stores like 7-Eleven and KK Super Mart within a 1km radius, and a Tesco Pernama Ekspres grocery store only 1.5km away. Enjoy family meals at nearby restaurants like Restoran D'syasya (1.7km) or the popular mamak stalls. While the unit is unfurnished, the building offers a communal swimming pool and playground, perfect for children's enjoyment. The efficient lift service ensures smooth movement for the whole family.
aiDescription.my: Temui keselesaan dan kemudahan keluarga di Koi Kinrara, Puchong. Kediaman 3 bilik tidur, 2 bilik air yang tidak berperabot ini menawarkan keluasan 1400 kaki persegi, sedia untuk sentuhan peribadi anda. Bayangkan mencipta rumah yang hangat dan menarik untuk orang tersayang anda di bilik-bilik luas ini. Hartanah ini terletak berdekatan dengan keperluan keluarga penting, dengan sekolah seperti KAFA Integrasi Nahdatul Islamiah hanya 1.4km jauhnya, dan kemudahan penjagaan kesihatan seperti Poliklinik PJCC pada 1.7km. Keperluan harian mudah diakses dengan pelbagai kedai serbaneka seperti 7-Eleven dan KK Super Mart dalam radius 1km, dan kedai runcit Tesco Pernama Ekspres hanya 1.5km jauhnya. Nikmati hidangan keluarga di restoran berdekatan seperti Restoran D'syasya (1.7km) atau gerai mamak yang popular. Walaupun unit ini tidak berperabot, bangunan ini menawarkan kolam renang komunal dan taman permainan, sesuai untuk keseronokan kanak-kanak. Perkhidmatan lif yang cekap memastikan pergerakan lancar untuk seisi keluarga.
aiDescription.cn: 在Koi Kinrara, Puchong体验家庭的舒适与便利。这套未装修的3卧室2浴室住宅提供宽敞的1400平方英尺空间，可供您个性化装修。想象一下，在这些宽敞的房间里为您的亲人打造温馨宜人的家。该物业靠近家庭必需品，如KAFA Integrasi Nahdatul Islamiah学校距离仅1.4公里，Poliklinik PJCC等医疗设施距离1.7公里。日常生活必需品易于获取，1公里范围内有多家便利店，如7-Eleven和KK Super Mart，Tesco Pernama Ekspres超市仅1.5公里。您可以在附近的餐厅，如Restoran D'syasya（1.7公里）或热门的嘛嘛档享用家庭用餐。虽然单元未装修，但大楼提供公共游泳池和游乐场，非常适合儿童玩耍。高效的电梯服务确保全家出行顺畅。

common.text_subscribe_to: Langgan untuk tips sewa rumah dan manfaat SPEEDHOME sekarang!
common.text_legal: SPEEDHOME is the safest and fastest leading rental property platform in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. SPEEDHOME is a safe platform for tenants and owners to communicate and deal with properties at zero deposit.
common.sunwayvelocitytwo,kualalumpur_ques_1: Why Kuala Lumpur is famous? Is it worth to stay?
common.ksunwayvelocitytwo,kualalumpur_ans_1: Kuala Lumpur is the ideal destination for both short visits or longer stays. It is Malaysia's capital city and one of Asia's most dynamics cities. This bustling metropolis is a melting pot of races and cultures and is home to a population of 1.6 million people. Transportation in KL is just great. The entire city can be explored by taxi, bus, train and metro. However, the main junctions in KL city centre are often extremely crowded during the peak before and after working hour.
common.kualalumpur_ques_1: Why Kuala Lumpur is famous? Is it worth to stay?
common.kualalumpur_ans_1: Kuala Lumpur is the ideal destination for both short visits or longer stays. It is Malaysia's capital city and one of Asia's most dynamics cities. This bustling metropolis is a melting pot of races and cultures and is home to a population of 1.6 million people. Transportation in KL is just great. The entire city can be explored by taxi, bus, train and metro. However, the main junctions in KL city centre are often extremely crowded during the peak before and after working hour.
common.kualalumpur_ques_2: How much do you need to live comfortably in Kuala Lumpur?
common.kualalumpur_ans_2: According to numbeo.com, the cost of living for a single person are around  RM 2083.04 without rent, wheres for a four-person family monthly cost is RM 7403.75 without rent.  Kuala Lumpur has the cost of living rank 325th out of 491 cities sin the word. Most of the expenses that might use while living in Kuala Lumpur are to the rental and transportation.
common.kualalumpur_ques_3: How do you get around in Kuala Lumpur?
common.kualalumpur_ans_3: Kuala Lumpur has a comprehensive rail transportation system, serviced by KL Monorail, Rapid Kl, Light Rail Transit (LRT) as well as the KTM commuter train. More parts of Kuala Lumpur are now connected by rails. The trains pass through the city and able to reach out of the commercial area. Buses are provided as well to reach out of the residential area. Taxi and Grab are probably the most convenient ways to travel from one place to another place in a short period.
common.kualalumpur_ques_4: Which district is under Kuala Lumpur?
common.kualalumpur_ans_4: There are 11 districts under Kuala Lumpur, the districts include Bukit Bintang, Titiwangsa, Setiawangsa, Wangsa Maju, Batu, Kepong, Segambut, Lembah Pantas, Seputeh, Bandar Tun Razak and Cheras.
common.kualalumpur_ques_5: What is the average rental in Kuala Lumpur?
common.kualalumpur_ans_5: By refering the house rental in speedhome, the average rental for one bedroom apartment near to the city centre is around RM2,200, whereas outside of city centre could be around RM 1,300.  For a three bedroom family home in city centre, the average rental is around RM4500 and outside of the city centre, it could be around RM 1,600.
common.cyberjaya_ans_1: The crime rate in Cyberjaya is low accoding to numbeo.com, it is safe to stay at Cyberjaya.
common.cyberjaya_ques_2: Is Cyberjaya a good place to stay?
common.cyberjaya_ans_2: Cyberjaya is surrounded by some famous areas such as Puchong, Putrajaya, Kajang, and Bangi. Besides that, from Cyberjaya to KLCC just need around 25 minutes. For those who work at KLIA area, choosing Cyberjaya to stay is also a good choice because from Cyberjaya to KLIA and KLIA 2 is just need around 25 minutes.
common.cyberjaya_ques_3: How far is Cyberjaya from KL? Is there any direct public transport between Cyberjaya and KL?
common.cyberjaya_ans_3: The road distance between Kuala Lumpur and Cyberjaya is 31.7 km. Yes, there is a direct bus and train from Cyberjaya to KL Sentral. The best way to get from Kuala Lumpur to Cyberjaya is to train which takes 18 minutes and cost around RM 23-40. Alternatively, you can take the bus, however, it takes time.
common.cyberjaya_ques_4: Are there any facilities in Cyberjaya?
common.cyberjaya_ans_4: There has a shopping mall in Cyberjaya which call D’Pulze Shopping Centre. There have Jaya Grocer which allow residents to buy some groceries in Cyberjaya. Besides that, you also can buy DIY equipment at ACE Hardware and get books at MPH and so much more. For the bank, in Cyberjaya, there have some bank branches there which are Maybank, HSBC, CIMB, Hong Leong Bank and Bank Rakyat.
common.cyberjaya_ans_5: Cost of living index in Cyberjaya will lower than Kuala Lumpur. Kuala Lumpur has 51.76% higher cost of living index than living in Cyberjaya. Besides that, rental prices in Cyberjaya is lower than rental prices in Kuala Lumpur.
common.cyberjaya_ques_6: What are the education facilities in Cyberjaya?
common.cyberjaya_ans_6: There are a primary school (Sekolah Kebangsaan Cyberjaya) and secondary public schools (Sekolah Menengah Cyberjaya) are built for the children of the general population in Cyberjaya. For tertiary education institutions that located in Cyberjaya including Multimedia University, Limkokwing University of Creative Technology, University Malaysia of Computer Science & Engineering, Heriot-Watt University, Cyberjaya University College of Medical Sciences, Cyber Putra College and Kirkby International College.
common.petalingjaya_ques_1: How far is Petaling Jaya from KL? What is the fastest way to get to KL from Petaling Jaya?
common.petalingjaya_ans_1: Total distance from Petaling Jaya to Kuala Lumpur is 10.81km. Petaling Jaya is surrounded by major highways such as the LDP, Federal Highway, Sprint and DUKE and all of these highways are offer easy access to Kuala Lumpur and other parts of Selangor. So, if you have a car, getting to KL from Petaling Jaya is easy. Besides that, in Petaling Jaya, there also have RAPID KL LRT station which can reach the city centre, Bangsar or even to Subang Jaya or Shah Alam. common.bangsar_ans_3: Bangsar is well served by public transport, the LRT Bangsar is connecting to the LRT Kelana Jaya Line. It also provides a hub for onward travel in Bangsar with taxi and RapidKL buses. A shuttle bus is providing to Midvalley from Bangsar LRT, therefore it is very convenient for people who want to work at the Mid Valley area.
common.bangsar_ques_4: What are the eateries in Bangsar?
common.bangsar_ans_4: Bangsar has a lot of eateries from Telawi to Jalan Kemuja. If you are hungry, you shall order the signature of Restoran Mahbub, Nasi Briyani Ayam Madu. The sticky sweet chicken is tender and flavourful, served atop fluffy and fragrant briyani rice cause the long rows of the entrance of this popular mamak. Instead of trying Nasi Briyani, you can go for the banana leaf rice which just cost you under Rm10 at the Fierce Curry House together with therie classic side dishes such as chicken tikka masala, mutton varuval and tandoori tiger prawns. For dinner, we highly recommend the truffle yakiniku don, slow-braised oyster blade, and the Botanica burger of Botanica + Co. Restaurant & Bar  where you can enjoy the wide range of local and international dishes whilst being surrounded by lush greenery in Bangsara South City.
common.bangsar_ans_5: Most of the landed and high-rise property in Bangsar are under the gated and guarded residential projects. These area are safe, especially for the families that looking for a good start. The crime rate has been kept at a minimum with the well designed proper fenceing, ample lighting and CCTV around every corner.
common.subanjaya_ques_1: How far is Subang Jaya from KL? Is there any train service?
common.subanjaya_ans_1: It is around 20km from the city centre of Kuala Lumpur to Subang Jaya, you can take the Light Rail Transit (LRT) from KL Sentral station to reach to the Subang Jaya station.
common.subanjaya_ques_2: What are the facilities and amenities in Subang Jaya?
common.subanjaya_ans_2: Subang Jaya is a complete township with residential, commercial, industrial, and educational components. It consists of the neighbourhood from SS12 to SS19, PJS7/PJS9/PJS11 of Bandar Sunway, UEP Subang Jaya (USJ), Putra Height and Batu Tiga. Living in Subang Jaya allow you access to all the facilities such as ell-equipped medical centres, cafe, and eateries as well as entertainment outlets. There are also plenty of shopping malls Subang Parade, Bandar Sunway, Empire Shopping Gallery and One City.
common.subanjaya_ques_3: What is the accessibility in Subang Jaya?
common.subanjaya_ans_3: Subang jaya has a great accessibility as it is connected to Kuala Lumpur, Shah Alam and Petaling Jaya by networks of expressways and efficient rail transit. Major highway that link to the area include Federal Highway, Shah Alam Expressway (KESAS), NKVE, NPE, North South Expressway and LDP. However, Subang Jaya has the bad traffic spills over onto the connecting roads for peak hour.
common.subanjaya_ques_4: What is the average rental price in Subang Jaya?
common.subanjaya_ans_4: According to numbeo.com, the average rental for one bedroom apartment near to the city centre is around RM1500, whereas outside of city centre could be around RM 800.  For a furnished three bedroom apartment in city centre, the average rental is around RM2500 and outside of the city centre, it could be around RM 2000.
common.subanjaya_ques_5: Where to stay in Subang Jaya?
common.subanjaya_ans_5: Subang Jaya neighbourhodd includes from SS12 to SS19, Taman Wangsa Baiduri, Taman Mutiara Subang and Taman Bukit Pelangi. There is an extension township called UEP Subang Jaya (USJ). USJ is made up of USJ 1 to USJ 27 besides USJ 3A to 3D, Subang Heights and USJ Heights. The common residential area for people who living in Subang Jaya are SS16 and SS15 as well as around Subang Jaya Lake in SS12.
common.kajang_ques_1: Is there any public transport in Kajang?
common.kajang_ans_1: The transportation systems include the public bus service, KTM and the newly installed MRT. With the opening of MRT Sungai Buloh-Kajang line, MRT feeder bus has begun operating linking the station with several housing areas. The station is the southern terminal of the MRT line. It is also an interchange station to KTM Seremban Line and KTM ETS.
common.kajang_ques_2: What is the accessibility of Kajang?
common.kajang_ans_2: Kajang is surrounded by four major highways which are, Kajang Dispersal Link Expressway (SILK), Kajang-Seremban Highway (Lekas), Southern Kajang Valley Expressway (SKVE) and Cheras-Kajang Expressway (CKE). To alleviate the daily traffic congestion, the government has introduced the Kajang SILK Highway that directly connects to another major highway, this provides a convenient to reduce travelling time to the people who make to and from Kuala Lumpur, Cheras, Sg. Long and Balakong, Putrajaya, Semenyih, Bangi, KL International Airport and Seremban.
common.kajang_ques_3: What are the education facilities in Kajang?
common.kajang_ans_3: There is a full range of schools in Kajang catering to students of all ages. At school level in Kajang, there are Chinese national school, local primary and secondary school, boarding schools as well as a few international schools such as Tanarata International Schools. For tertiary education,  there are a few colleges in Kajang town, such as University Tunku Abdul Rahman (UTAR), University Putra Malaysia (UPM), New Era College, University of Nottingham Malaysia Campus. There are also other international schools in the vicinity.
common.kajang_ques_4: What is the average rental price for Kajang property?
common.kajang_ans_4: According to the property that posted in the speedhome.com, the average rental price for a 3 bedroom unit is around RM 1100.
common.kajang_ans_5: According to the numbeo,com, the level of crime in Kajang is moderate. Kajang has took 5 critical and immediate steps such as separation of areas from walkways to the main road, affixing bollards, clearing public areas blocked by overgrown foliage and  brightening up of pedestrian bridges, tunnels, car parks and public areas. Some residential area has  responsible residents got together and formed a Rukun Tetangga and engaged security guards during the recent festival holidays.
common.kelanjaya_ques_1: What are the recreational facilities in Kelana Jaya?
common.kelanjaya_ans_1: Paradigm Mall is the located right at the centre of Kelana Jaya and it is meant to cater to the local and residents. There are a variety of shops and restaurants in the mall. It is conveniently accessible by shuttle bus and from Kelana Jaya LRT station. Kelana Jaya Lake Park is also popular which attracts the people from neighbouring area come to this park to relax and unwind after a long day at work as well as fishing at the largest lake in the park.
common.kelanjaya_ques_2: Where to stay in Kelana Jaya?
common.kelanjaya_ans_2: Kelana Jaya is a suburb in Petaling Jaya, It comprises mainly of landed properties with a few high rise as well. Most property of Kelana Jaya is located in SS3, SS4, SS5, SS6 and SS7 neighbourhoods.
common.kelanjaya_ques_3: What is the cheapest way to get from Kuala Lumpur Airport to Kelana Jaya?
common.kelanjaya_ans_3: Kelana Jaya is well served by public transport. The cheapest way to get from Kuala Lumpur Airport to Kelana Jaya is to bus which costs around RM12 and takes an hour. There is a direct bus departing from Kuala Lumpur International Airport 2 and arriving at Paradigm mall.
common.kelanjaya_ques_4: What are the eateries in Kelana Jaya?
common.kelanjaya_ans_4: As Kelana Jaya is dense area with high-rise building and commercial centre, many restaurants are opening within the area. Pig Out cafe which located at the Park Lane Commercial Centre, serve the prime belly cut of the pig that  roasted to perfection. Moreover, you can also enjoy at 7 types of grilled fish from iKna Kembung to stingrays which offer by Fend Ikan Bakar in SS5. If you want to try something different, you also can go to the night market at ss@ to enjoy stinky toufu.
common.kelanjaya_ques_5: Where are the commercial areas in Kelana Jaya?
common.kelanjaya_ans_5: There are several commercial centre in Kelana Jaya, such as , PJ21 Commercial centre, Kelana Business Centre, NZX Commercial Centre, Parklane Commercial Hub, Sunwaymas Commercial Centre Management Office and Da Vinci Sunway Mas Commercial Centre. Many large companies has chosen Kelana Jaya area to set up their office, such as Malaysia Airlines.
common.kepong_ans_1: The main access roads to Kepong are Damansara-Puchong Expressway, Jalan Kuching, MRR II and Jalan Ipoh. RapidKL bus and Metro bus provides transport here. Kepong is also served by KTM komuter line, where the station is located in the northern area of Kuala Lumpur along the Rawang - Seremban route. There are 4 stations will pass through Kepong for upcoming MRT 2 Sugai Buloh-Serdang-Putrajaya which will make Kepong more accessible upon it completion.
common.kepong_ques_2: Where is the residential area of Kepong?
common.kepong_ans_2: Kepong is one of the earliest townships in Kuala Lumpur’s history. The oldest area in Kepong like Bandar Menjalara, Taman Indah Perdana, Taman Kemacahaya, Taman Kepong, Kepong Baru, Desa Aman Puri, Desa Jaya, Jinjang Utara, Jinjang Selatan, Taman Bukit Maluri, Taman Bukit Desa and Taman Ehsan are home to thousands of low-,medium and high-end houses as well as traditional and heritage shops. With the development, Kepong now has become known as the place has beautiful and affordable homes. There are some apartments and condominums where suitable for working adult and students, such as Kepong Sentral Condominum, Casa Prima, Greenview Apartment, The Henge Residence and others.
common.kepong_ques_3: What are the amenities in Kepong ?
common.kepong_ans_3: Amenities in the vicinity include local and international schools, college, shopping malls, hypermarket, wet market, banks, eateries, reataurants and hospitals
common.kepong_ques_4: What is the average rental price in Kepong?
common.kepong_ans_4: According to the information in speedhome, for a whole unit with 3 bedroom with 1 to 2 bathrooms, the average rental is RM 1300 in Kepong.
common.kepong_ans_5: In Kepong there have a famous foodtruck name Authentic Thai Food Foodtruck. The foodtruck is selling Authentic Thai Food.If you are a Thaifood lover, this place you cannot miss. Besides that, there also have a famous Nasi Lemak which always long quene. Kepong still have many famous food restaurant or place such as Old School Style Ice Kacang, Salt-baked Chicken, Handmade Pan Mee and more.
common.kotadamansara_ques_1: Is Kota Damansara a good place to stay?
common.kotadamansara_ans_1: Kota Damansara is a great place to stay as it is a location far enough from the rush hours within the city centre. It is a peaceful location and very near to the leisure and shopping mall such as The Curve, Tesco and IKEA. Encorp Strand Mall and Sunway Giza Mall is just right in front of the Kota Damansara train station. For education facilities, SEGI University is perfectly located near the MRT as well, therefore many students can look for the house near to the uni such as Cova Vila, Cova Suit, De Rozelle, Sunsuria, D' Rimba Apartment and Sunway Nexis SOHO apartment.
common.kotadamansara_ques_2: Any public transport in Kota Damansara?
common.kotadamansara_ans_2: The MRT train has just launched in Kota Damansara which benefits the residents to access to another place. Buses are provided to the people to reach the Kelana Jaya LRT station from the residential area.
common.kotadamansara_ques_3: What are the recommended restaurant around Kota Damansara?
common.kotadamansara_ans_3: Fifth Palate is specializing in asian fusion, serving breakfast and bruch food. Beside that,  you can also try the Shell Out Seafood, they serve crabs, clams, crayfish and other creatures of the sea.  The seafood comes served with an array of fiery flavourful sauces or mild buttery ones that surprise the senses with every dip and dash.  After a heavy meal, a dessert course help digest the meal, you can enjoy cakes, cookies and intrcately decorated tower of toasts at Dreamz Bakery in Kota Damansara. People also enjoy the food at The Strand, Sunway Giza Mall and Cascades.
common.kotadamansara_ques_4: Any houses to rent in Kota Damansara?
common.kotadamansara_ans_4: Yes, there are several whole units to rent with the average rental price, RM 2200 at Emporis, Cova Suite and I Residence in Kota Damansara.
common.kotadamansara_ques_5: What is the living cost in Kota Damansara?
common.kotadamansara_ans_5: Th cost of living in is around RM 960 according to the costof.live. It will be affortable for a working adults with the RM 3000 salary per month.
common.oldklangroad_ques_1: What amenities and facilities are included in Old Klang Road?
common.oldklangroad_ans_1: Old Klang Road gives you easy access to shopping malls like Mid Valley City, Pearl Point shopping mall and OUG Plaza, not to mention access to several government schools, an international school, institutions of higher education, hotels shopping complexes, government institutions and a wide choice of eateries.
common.oldklangroad_ques_2: What is the road condition in Old Klang Road?
common.oldklangroad_ans_2: The area is densely populated and it acting as a major intersaction between cities.The Old Klang Road is directly link to a number of freeways including Federal Highway. SPRINT Highway, New Pantai Expressway (NPE), Damansara - Puchong Expressway (LDP) and KL- Seremban Expressway. Therefore, with the good connectivity, the traffic congestion is bound to happen.
common.oldklangroad_ques_3: How to get to old klang road in Kuala Lumpur by Bus, Metro or Train?
common.oldklangroad_ans_3: In term of public transport, Rapid KL buses are provided that move along this main road. The closest KTM station is at Mid Valley.
common.oldklangroad_ques_4: Where do people stay and what is the average rental price in Old Klang Road?
common.oldklangroad_ans_4: People in Old Klang Road usually stay at high-rise such as ViVo Residential Suites, Scott Garden, OUG Parklane, CitiZen, Riverville Residences and Southbank Residence, while for landed property, people usually stay at OUG, Happy Garden, Taman Lian Hoe, Taman Desa and Taman United.  The average the rental price for 3 bedroom unit is around RM 1800.
common.oldklangroad_ques_5: What are the recommended food in old klang road?
common.oldklangroad_ans_5: Old Klan Road as one of the oldest roads in Kuala Lumpur which link to the city center, there are a lot of restaurant along the way on Old Klang Road, for example BBQ Thai Street food, Coco Steamboat and Ishin Japanese Restaurant. You can also enjoy varety of street food despite the development here, such as Cao Cao Grilled Lamb & Wantan Mee stalls, Big Tree Fried Pan Mee, Asam Laksa in the OUG and Happy Garden Pasar Malam despite the rapid development here.
common.klang_ans_1: Klang claimed to be the 5th dangerous Asian city in 2016, it consists of a large number of criminal gangs reported to operating in Klang. The level of crime rates in Klang is high according to the numbeo.com.
common.klang_ques_2: What is the distance from Klang to Kuala Lumpur and the fastest way to travel between both places?
common.klang_ans_2: Distance from KL to Klang is 29km. There are 2 ways to get to KL from Klang. The first way is taking the bus and the second way is to take the train. Both public transport will take about 1 hour above to reach the destination. The fastest way is taking a taxi which cost RM 75- RM 95 and it only take around 35minutes.
common.klang_ques_3: What is the best in Klang?
common.klang_ans_3: Klang has inevitable shopping centres such as Aeon Bukit Tinggi, Aeon Bukit Raja, Centro Mall, Giant Hypermarket (at Bandar Bukit Tinggi and Klang Sentral) and GM Klang Wholesale City (Bandar Botanic). Klang is also home to Port Klang, the busiest port in the country. Because of the port, Klang is a booming industrial property hotspot. Furthermore, Klang consist of a few hospitals and medical centres that ensure the residents can receive better care such as Pantai Hospital Klang which offers a selection of room and services with high quality and personalised care to the Klang neighbourhood.
common.klang_ques_4: What are the public transport and accessibility in Klang?
common.klang_ans_4: Klang is served by three light rapid transit (LRT) lines, two commuter rail lines, one monorail line, one bus rapid transit line, one mass rapid transit (MRT) line and three airport rail links, two to the Kuala Lumpur International Airport and one to the Sultan Abdul Aziz Shah Airport. Klang is connected to the rest of the Klang Valley via the Federal Highway, the New Klang Valley Expressway, South Klang Valley Expressway, the North Klang Straits Bypass (New North Klang Straits Bypass) as well as the KESAS Highway.
common.klang_ques_5: What are the eateries around klang?
common.klang_ans_5: Klang is known for its Ba Kut Teh, Seng Huat Ba Kut Teh and Teluk Pulai Pottery Ba Kut Teh are the well-known restaurant in Klang and has many years of history. Instead of ba Kut Teh, you also can try the korean dishes of well known korean restaurant, Myung-Ga Korean Restaurant, they serve salmon fried fish ball, bibimbap, jajang myon as well as toppoki. The most signifixant Malay food spot in Klang is at “Emporium Makan”  which located at the opposite of Pasar Jawa.
common.klang_ques_6: Is there any medical center around Klang?
common.klang_ans_6: There are several medical center or hospital for the resident in Klang. For example, in Jalan Langat there is a big Hospital call Hospital Tengku Ampuan Rahimah (Klang General Hospital). Besides that, in Bandar Bukit Tinggi also have a Big Hospital named Manipal Hospitals Klang. In Klang there are almost 11 hospital. If you are living in Klang there are no any worried about Hospital because the Hospital is surounded all around Klang.

listings_grid.p: Terokai senarai yang tersedia dengan sewa bulanan, kelengkapan, lokasi dan butiran tarikh masuk yang jelas. Buka senarai untuk semak terma penuh sebelum membuat pertanyaan.

why_rent.h2: Kenapa Penyewa Pilih SPEEDHOME untuk Sewa Rumah di Malaysia
why_rent.p: SPEEDHOME membantu penyewa menyewa dengan lebih yakin melalui senarai yang telah disahkan, komunikasi terus dengan pemilik dan pilihan Zero Deposit pada hartanah yang layak.

1.p: Senarai yang layak boleh mengurangkan kos masuk awal. Semak terma pembayaran tepat pada setiap senarai sebelum membuat pertanyaan.

2.p: Tanya soalan, sahkan butiran dan aturkan langkah seterusnya terus melalui pengalaman penyenaraian.

3.p: Bandingkan sewa, kelengkapan, kemudahan, jenis bilik dan ketersediaan sebelum anda mula menyenarai pendek.

how_it_works.h2: Cara SPEEDHOME Berfungsi untuk Penyewa di Malaysia
how_it_works.p: Bergerak dari penemuan ke keputusan melalui aliran sewa ringkas yang direka untuk pemilihan lebih cepat dan komunikasi yang lebih jelas.

1.p: Gunakan penapis lokasi, bajet dan jenis hartanah untuk mempersempitkan rumah yang sesuai dengan keperluan anda.

2.p: Hubungi pemilik, tanya soalan dan aturkan lawatan fizikal atau maya apabila tersedia.

3.p: Selesaikan langkah seterusnya dengan lebih cepat setelah anda mengesahkan hartanah yang betul dan memahami keperluan masuk.

popular_areas.h2: Kawasan Sewa Popular di Seluruh Malaysia untuk Diterokai
popular_areas.p: Semak pasaran sewa utama dan terokai senarai mengikut bandar atau kawasan kejiranan sebelum mendalami rumah tertentu.

faq.h2: Soalan Lazim Mengenai Penyewaan di SPEEDHOME
faq.p: Dapatkan jawapan pantas tentang Zero Deposit, kelengkapan, lawatan dan tarikh masuk.

faqData.cyberjaya_ques_1: Berapakah harga sewa purata untuk rumah di Cyberjaya?
faqData.cyberjaya_ans_1: Rumah di Cyberjaya biasanya berharga antara RM2,000 hingga RM5,000 sebulan, bergantung pada saiz dan lokasi.
faqData.cyberjaya_ques_2: Adakah rumah di Cyberjaya lengkap berperabot?
faqData.cyberjaya_ans_2: Sesetengah rumah lengkap berperabot, manakala yang lain separuh berperabot atau kosong.
faqData.cyberjaya_ques_3: Adakah Cyberjaya tempat yang baik untuk menyewa rumah?
faqData.cyberjaya_ans_3: Ya, ia adalah kawasan yang maju dengan infrastruktur moden, sesuai untuk profesional dan keluarga.
faqData.cyberjaya_ques_4: Adakah terdapat rumah sewa yang mesra haiwan peliharaan?
faqData.cyberjaya_ans_4: Sesetengah tuan rumah membenarkan haiwan peliharaan—semak butiran penyenaraian untuk polisi tertentu.
faqData.cyberjaya_ques_5: Adakah rumah di Cyberjaya menyediakan tempat letak kereta?
faqData.cyberjaya_ans_5: Ya, kebanyakan rumah menyediakan tempat letak kereta khas.
faqData.cyberjaya_ans_6: Lazimnya, penyewa membayar utiliti secara berasingan melainkan dinyatakan dalam perjanjian sewa.
faqData.cyberjaya_ques_7: Bagaimana saya boleh mencari rumah sewa tanpa deposit?
faqData.cyberjaya_ans_7: SPEEDHOME menawarkan pilihan sewa tanpa deposit untuk hartanah terpilih.
faqData.cyberjaya_ques_8: Adakah Cyberjaya tempat yang selamat untuk menyewa rumah?
faqData.cyberjaya_ans_8: Ya, ia adalah bandar yang selamat dengan banyak komuniti berpagar.
faqData.cyberjaya_ques_9: Bolehkah saya menyewa rumah untuk tempoh pendek?
faqData.cyberjaya_ans_9: Sesetengah tuan rumah menawarkan sewa jangka pendek, tetapi kebanyakannya lebih suka sewa jangka panjang.
faqData.cyberjaya_ques_10: Bagaimana cara menyewa rumah di Cyberjaya?
faqData.cyberjaya_ans_10: Layari penyenaraian di SPEEDHOME, minta lawatan, dan hantar permohonan sewa anda.
faqData.cyberjaya_studio_ques_1: Berapakah harga sewa purata untuk studio di Cyberjaya?
faqData.cyberjaya_studio_ans_1: Sewa studio bermula dari sekitar RM900 sebulan.

faqData.kualalumpur_room_ques_1: Bagaimana cara terpantas untuk cari bilik atau rumah sewa di KL?
faqData.kualalumpur_room_ans_1: Cara terpantas dan paling efisien adalah menggunakan platform carian sewa seperti Speedhome. Anda boleh menaip kata kunci umum seperti 'bilik sewa kuala lumpur' atau lokasi spesifik seperti 'rumah sewa Bandar Sri Permaisuri' untuk melihat ratusan pilihan yang disahkan. Gunakan fungsi penapis untuk menyusun mengikut harga, jenis hartanah, dan sama ada anda mahu menyewa dengan Zero Deposit.
faqData.kualalumpur_room_ques_2: Saya mencari rumah sewa di Bandar Sri Permaisuri. Adakah ia kawasan yang bagus?
faqData.kualalumpur_room_ans_2: Ya, Bandar Sri Permaisuri adalah pilihan yang sangat popular, terutamanya untuk keluarga dan golongan profesional. Kawasan ini strategik kerana mempunyai beberapa stesen LRT, akses mudah ke pusat bandar, dan berdekatan dengan HUKM. Ia juga terkenal dengan kemudahan rekreasi seperti Taman Tasik Permaisuri, menjadikannya lokasi yang seimbang untuk kehidupan dan kerja.
faqData.kualalumpur_room_ques_3: Adakah berbaloi menyewa bilik di pusat bandar seperti Kg. Baru atau Chow Kit?
faqData.kualalumpur_room_ans_3: Sangat berbaloi jika anda bekerja di pusat bandar KL. Kelebihan utama mencari bilik sewa Kg. Baru KL atau bilik sewa Chow Kit adalah jarak berjalan kaki ke pejabat, akses terus ke rangkaian LRT/Monorel, dan pelbagai pilihan makanan pada harga berpatutan. Ia sesuai untuk mereka yang mahu menjimatkan masa dan kos pengangkutan harian.

faqData.damansara_terrace_ans_4: Ya, banyak unit mempunyai taman kecil atau kawasan patio.
faqData.damansara_terrace_ques_5: Adakah terdapat rumah teres dua tingkat untuk disewa?
faqData.damansara_terrace_ans_5: Ya, kedua-dua rumah teres satu dan dua tingkat tersedia.
faqData.damansara_terrace_ques_6: Adakah rumah teres di Damansara mempunyai ruang kereta?
faqData.damansara_terrace_ans_6: Kebanyakan rumah teres menyediakan ruang letak kereta bertutup untuk dua kereta atau lebih.
faqData.damansara_terrace_ques_7: Bolehkah saya mengubah suai atau mengubah rumah teres yang disewa?
faqData.damansara_terrace_ans_7: Kebenaran tuan rumah diperlukan untuk pengubahsuaian besar.
faqData.damansara_terrace_ques_8: Adakah rumah teres di Damansara mesra haiwan peliharaan?
faqData.damansara_terrace_ans_8: Sesetengah tuan rumah membenarkan haiwan peliharaan; adalah disyorkan untuk menyemak senarai individu.
faqData.damansara_terrace_ques_9: Adakah pengangkutan awam mudah diakses dari lokasi rumah teres?
faqData.damansara_terrace_ans_9: Banyak kawasan mempunyai akses mudah ke stesen MRT, LRT, dan laluan bas.
faqData.damansara_terrace_ques_10: Bagaimana saya boleh memohon sewaan rumah teres di Damansara?
faqData.damansara_terrace_ans_10: Platform dalam talian seperti SPEEDHOME memudahkan lawatan hartanah dan permohonan.
faqData.property_faq_rental_q1: Berapakah sewa bulanan untuk {{propertyType}} ini di {{locationName}}?
faqData.property_faq_rental_a1: Sewa bulanan untuk {{propertyType}} ini di {{locationName}} ialah RM{{price}}. Ini termasuk {{inclusions}}.
faqData.property_faq_facilities_a: {{locationName}} menawarkan ketersambungan dan kemudahan yang sangat baik termasuk {{amenities}}. Kawasan ini dilayani dengan baik oleh pengangkutan awam dan mempunyai akses mudah ke pusat membeli-belah, restoran, dan kemudahan rekreasi.
faqData.property_faq_viewing_q: Adakah lawatan maya tersedia untuk {{propertyType}} ini?
faqData.property_faq_viewing_a: Ya, lawatan maya tersedia untuk {{propertyType}} ini. Anda boleh menjadualkan lawatan maya melalui platform SPEEDHOME untuk melihat hartanah dari jauh sebelum membuat keputusan.
faqData.property_faq_documents_q: Apakah dokumen yang diperlukan untuk menyewa {{propertyType}} ini?
faqData.property_faq_documents_a: Untuk menyewa {{propertyType}} ini, anda biasanya memerlukan: IC/pasport yang sah, surat pekerjaan, slip gaji (3 bulan terkini), penyata bank, dan bil utiliti. Homerunner SPEEDHOME akan membimbing anda melalui proses dokumentasi.
faqData.property_faq_fees_q: Adakah terdapat sebarang bayaran tambahan untuk menyewa di {{locationName}}?
faqData.property_faq_fees_a: Yuran sewa biasanya termasuk deposit keselamatan (biasanya 2 bulan sewa), deposit utiliti, dan yuran setem. SPEEDHOME menawarkan pilihan tanpa deposit untuk penyewa yang layak. Pasukan kami akan memberikan pecahan terperinci semua kos yang terlibat.
faqData.property_faq_room_inclusions_q: Apakah yang disertakan dalam sewaan bilik di {{locationName}}?
faqData.property_faq_room_inclusions_a: Sewaan bilik termasuk {{inclusions}}. Kemudahan berkongsi biasanya termasuk dapur, ruang tamu, dan bilik air bersama. Kemasukan khusus akan diperincikan dalam penyenaraian.
faqData.property_faq_property_facilities_q: Apakah kemudahan yang tersedia dalam hartanah ini?
faqData.property_faq_property_facilities_a: Hartanah ini menawarkan pelbagai kemudahan termasuk {{facilities}}. Kemudahan ini meningkatkan pengalaman hidup anda dan memberikan kemudahan untuk penduduk.
